purpose: Per-item flag registry. Each item is an independently-toggleable flag (SKILL.md `flags: <ids>`), lazy-loaded from addenda/. test_type tells the harness HOW to verify each item.

test_types.output_ablation: baseline vs +flag on a controlled task with a known answer; judge the artifact. Runnable in parallel.
test_types.structural_check: deterministic check on artifacts / the validator (flag-gated): mechanism present + well-formed; gate DISCRIMINATES proposed vs baseline.
test_types.needs_human: requires a human in the loop; not auto-testable.

items.test: <exactly how Phase 5 verifies this item, incl. the known-answer task or the validator flag>
